title: Sewer Tunnel
text: The passage tightens; boots splash through knee-deep filth while iron rails and cracked masonry cut dim shapes in torchlight.
imagePrompt: A narrow, wet stone sewer tunnel lit by torches: slick walls, shallow running water, discarded tools and dripping stone.

title: Flooded Chamber
text: A low chamber yawns, half-drowned in oily water. Something moves under the surface — a shadow or a machine — and the air feels wrong.
imagePrompt: A half-submerged stone chamber with oily water, scattered wreckage and a faint glint of metal beneath the surface.

choices.text: Return and report to the captain

title: Collapsed Gallery
text: Rubble chokes the passage; rune-carved lintels pulse with a faint light as the draft finds its way through the cracks.
imagePrompt: A collapsed stone gallery with rune-etched lintels, dust-filled air and timber braces half-buried in debris.

choices.text: Remove the rubble and force a way

title: Underfortress Gate
text: An inner gate bars the way — iron long corroded, its frame carved with warding sigils. Beyond, darkness promises secrets and danger.
imagePrompt: A heavy inner gate with rusted iron and glowing sigils, the small gap beyond swallowed by shadow.

choices.text: Try the recovered key on the lock
Force the gate open with tools

title: Reliquary Approach
text: Past the gate the reliquary corridor hums, braided runes glowing beneath scuffed feet; the air thrums with a distant, patient power.
imagePrompt: A long reliquary corridor lit by dim braziers, arcane symbols glowing faintly on the stone floor and dust motes drifting in the light.
